one_time_description: First Nations Drinking Water Settlement partial receipt (prior year was $500,000)
economic_notes: 25.5% interest in Pesakastew Solar Limited Partnership (10 MW solar farm supplying power to SaskPower, completed during fiscal year). 8.3% interest in FHQ Casino Holdings Ltd. Peace Hills Trust operating line of credit up to $1,935,000 for operations and economic development. Red Dog Holdings Ltd. and Red Dog Holdings Limited Partnership consolidated.
notes: Consolidated entity includes Star Blanket Cree Nation, CMHC Housing Program, Star Blanket Rentals, Red Dog Holdings Ltd., and Red Dog Holdings Limited Partnership. Star Blanket Treaty Land Entitlement Trust is excluded as not controlled. Significant increase in TCA from $15.4M to $21.0M due to major capital projects including WTP upgrade ($9.1M cumulative) and Lebret sewer upgrades. ISC revenue nearly doubled year-over-year largely due to capital project funding. Deferred revenue decreased significantly ($7.85M to $2.85M) as WTP upgrade project expenditures recognized. New PS 3400 Revenue standard adopted April 1, 2023 prospectively. Operating deficit within accumulated surplus of $2.2M. No schedule of remuneration included in provided text. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $12,465,297 + CMHC $255,378 + NRCan $116,855 + FHQ Tribal Council $457,191 (treated as government transfer) + FNDWS $45,577 = $13,340,298; OSR = rental income + other revenue + First Nations Trust + FHQ Casino Holdings + University of Saskatchewan + File Hills = $397,960 + $270,811 + $357,621 + $90,000 + $35,531 + $6,167 = $1,158,090.
